tasks.subject: Task 0: Test scaffolding
tasks.description:
Setup pytest + pytest-homeassistant-custom-component. Files: tests/__init__.py, tests/conftest.py, requirements_test.txt, pytest.ini, .gitignore.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/__init__.py", "tests/conftest.py", "requirements_test.txt", "pytest.ini", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "pip install -r requirements_test.txt && pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pytest installed", "pytest runs without crash", ".gitignore excludes cache"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Package scaffolding elmax_local
tasks.description:
Create custom_components/elmax_local/ with manifest.json, const.py, stub __init__.py.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/__init__.py", "custom_components/elmax_local/manifest.json", "custom_components/elmax_local/const.py", "tests/test_package.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_package.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["manifest valid", "DOMAIN='elmax_local'", "3 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Transport ABC + enums + Registry skeleton
tasks.description:
Define Transport ABC contract from spec sez. 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/transport/__init__.py", "tests/transport/__init__.py", "tests/transport/test_abc.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/transport/test_abc.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ABC not instantiable", "subclass instantiable", "defaults raise NotImplementedError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AuthManager
tasks.description:
JWT login, refresh, parse_exp, exponential backoff.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/auth.py", "tests/test_auth.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_auth.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_exp valid/malformed", "login OK", "token cached", "refresh within margin", "handle_401 invalidates", "403 triggers backoff"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: HttpTransport
tasks.description:
POLL + COMMAND. Probe via login, fetch /discovery, send_command via POST /cmd.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/transport/http.py", "tests/transport/test_http.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/transport/test_http.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["probe OK on 200", "probe False on 401", "fetch_state returns dict", "send_command 200=ok", "422 retries", "503 fails"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: MqttTransport
tasks.description:
PUSH + POLL + COMMAND. Distingue 200 Status OK da 200 Status Update.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/transport/mqtt.py", "tests/transport/test_mqtt.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/transport/test_mqtt.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["distinguishes status_ok vs update", "forwards both to on_push"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: WebSocketTransport
tasks.description:
PUSH only. Reconnect con backoff 5-120s.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/transport/websocket.py", "tests/transport/test_websocket.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/transport/test_websocket.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["probe uses auth token", "malformed dropped", "callback invoked on message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: TransportRegistry routing
tasks.description:
Routing logic. HTTP primary, MQTT fallback for POLL/COMMAND.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/transport/__init__.py", "tests/transport/test_registry.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/transport/test_registry.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["start_all probes", "fetch HTTP first", "fallback to MQTT on None", "command HTTP first", "get_active_push filters"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: ElmaxState + Coordinator skeleton
tasks.description:
DataUpdateCoordinator subclass + ElmaxState dataclass. Include retry loop for DEGRADED transports.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/coordinator.py", "tests/test_coordinator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_coordinator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ElmaxState dataclass", "init wires AuthManager + Registry", "update_interval correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Coordinator data flow
tasks.description:
_parse, _on_push_state_update, _async_update_data with push-fresh skip.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/coordinator.py", "tests/test_coordinator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_coordinator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse indexes by endpoint_id", "push update sets data", "poll skipped when push fresh"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Coordinator commands
tasks.description:
async_send_command + _post_command_verify background.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/coordinator.py", "tests/test_coordinator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_coordinator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["command schedules verify on success", "no verify on failure"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/alarm_control_panel.py", "tests/test_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_entities.py -k alarm -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unique_id format", "alarm_state from area stato", "disarm uses PIN"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["custom_components/elmax_local/__init__.py", "tests/test_init.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_init.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setup creates coordinator", "handles AuthFailed/NotReady", "reload on options change"]}
```
